narrative: RBA hikes cash rate 25bps to 4.35% in an 8-1 vote as Middle East inflation risks mount — AUD/USD edges higher to 0.7186 while 60bp carry advantage vs Fed supports the bid. Geopolitical risk premium remains elevated as Iran missile developments and oil volatility pressure Asian FX; gold lower -0.18%; equities +0.81%; DXY +0.11%; VIX 17.4. Watch RBNZ Financial Stability Report and RBA Governor Bullock's post-hike commentary for further policy guidance.
